long_description:
[STGSRE] Share mount target creation failure - Alert-ID: STG-SHARE-SYSDIG-321 in ca-mon-prod01-zone1-zone-control and the pod share-mount-target-controller is Triggered

TIP Situation: Observed smt create failure
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-share:ca-mon::ca-mon-prod01-zone1-zone-control:workloadname:share-mount-target-controller
TIP Short Description: Observed smt create failure

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
